text:
ABC Technologies Pvt. Ltd.
Employee Policy Handbook
1. Working Hours
Employees are expected to work from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM, Monday through Friday. Flexible work arrangements
may be approved by management.
2. Attendance and Leave Policy
Employees are entitled to paid annual leave, sick leave, and public holidays according to company policy. Leave
requests must be submitted through the HR portal in advance.
3. Code of Conduct
All employees must maintain professional behavior, respect colleagues

, and follow workplace ethics. Harassment,
discrimination, or misconduct will not be tolerated.
4. Remote Work Policy
Employees approved for remote work must ensure availability during office hours and maintain productivity
standards.
5. Confidentiality
Company information, client data, and internal documents are confidential and must not be shared outside the
organization.
6. IT and Security Policy
Employees must use company systems responsibly. Unauthorized software installations and sharing p

asswords
are prohibited.
7. Performance Reviews
Performance evaluations are conducted every six months to review employee goals, achievements, and
development plans.
8. Dress Code
Employees are expected to maintain professional attire suitable for the workplace environment.
9. Termination Policy

Employees may resign with prior notice as per their employment agreement. The company reserves the right to
terminate employment for policy violations.
10. Acknowledgment
All employees are required to r

ead and acknowledge these policies during onboarding.
This document is a sample employee policy handbook intended for demonstration purposes only.
